title: MCP Server Help
duration: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
description: I have a MCP server set up locally. I can access it locally on Claude Desktop. However, I am unable to figure out how to make it usable via an endpoint. The server is written with python and langchain. I also can potentially use Docker and Coolify for deployment. If this goes well. I could potentially ask for more help as an Agentic AI advise.

title: Claude MCP Integration Expert Needed
description: Job Description: We are looking for a skilled freelancer to integrate Claude MCP into our system. The ideal candidate will have experience in API integrations and a good understanding of Claude MCP. Responsibilities include configuring settings, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring smooth data flow. Strong communication skills are essential for collaboration with our development team. If you're passionate about enhancing system performance through integration, we want to hear from you!

title: Developer for FlutterFlow - MCP
description: Project Overview We’re building Orbis, a platform to empower small businesses from idea to launch and beyond, starting with the business plan. The app will provide tools and AI-powered features (e.g., alerts, growth suggestions) to help entrepreneurs succeed. We’re pre-revenue and seeking a skilled FlutterFlow developer to bring our vision to life. Current Status Designs: Figma wireframes ready for implementation. Scope of Work Develop a web app using FlutterFlow based on existing Figma wireframes. User Flow is built out and screens are built documentation is in work on notion. Implement core features, including: User onboarding and authentication. Business planning and management tools AI-driven alerts and suggestions (integrating APIs or basic logic). Ensure a user-friendly, responsive UI/UX. Collaborate with the founding team to refine features and iterate based on feedback. Requirements Must-Have Proven experience with FlutterFlow and building apps. Familiarity with translating Figma designs into functional apps. Knowledge of Firebase or similar for backend integration (auth, database). Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, early-stage startup. Nice-to-Have: Experience with AI/ML API integration (e.g., for alerts or analytics). Background in B2B or small business-focused apps. Strong communication skills and a passion for startups.

title: MCP C# Server / SSAS Analysis Service
duration: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
description: Install a MCP C# SDK on a Windows server. Connect it to a SSAS Database and make it available on the same LAN for LLM Clients to prompt simple queries.

title: Senior Backend Engineer With MCP / AI Focus
description: Looking for a software engineer who has strong experience with MCPs, data analysis, data pipelines, and integrations. You will be working on software with a proven market that is about to go to market. You need to understand Claude Code and use it daily, as that is the software that many of our users will be using the software from. You need to be able to build scalable data pipelines and have experience and understanding of B2B data analysis and GTM pipelines. Here is more info: What We Do We build AI-powered GTM (go-to-market) software for agencies and service businesses. The platform automates the entire outbound pipeline: prospect research, content creation from call transcripts, cold email/LinkedIn outreach, lead magnet delivery, and client fulfillment — all orchestrated by AI agents via MCP. Stack - TypeScript end-to-end — Next.js, React, Node.js - Supabase (Postgres + pgvector) — shared DB, vector search, auth, RLS - Trigger.dev — ~160 background tasks across 14 domains (enrichment, content gen, outreach, DFY automation) - A MCP / CLI first approach - Claude + OpenAI — content generation, classification, embeddings (pgvector, 1536-dim) - Deploy: Railway, Vercel, Trigger.dev cloud - Integrations: Unipile, HeyReach, PlusVibe, Apify, Attio, Stripe, and ~10 enrichment providers in a waterfall Why Work Here - You'd be the first engineering hire shaping infrastructure that AI agents use directly — not just building UI for humans - Real production pipeline doing real revenue (DFY service model, paying clients) - Greenfield scaling problems — the architecture works today but needs an engineer's hand to handle 10x volume - Heavy AI/LLM application work — not training models, but orchestrating them in production pipelines What Keeps Us Up at Night 1. Pipeline throughput — transcript processing, enrichment waterfalls, and content generation are all sequential. Needs parallelization and proper queue infrastructure. 2. pgvector at scale — 500 entries is fine. 50K will hurt without HNSW indexes or a dedicated vector DB. 3. Single shared database — every app hits one Supabase instance. No read replicas, no connection pooling beyond defaults. Contention risk grows with volume. 4. No observability — no pipeline metrics, no cost-per-lead tracking, no latency dashboards. Scaling blind. 5. Rate limit management — Claude, OpenAI, and enrichment APIs all have limits. No centralized throttling across concurrent pipelines. Thanks

title: Claude Desktop MCP Shopify integrations Windows
description: I need help setting up a Shopify MCP server connection with Claude Desktop on Windows. I already have: Claude Desktop installed Node.js installed Shopify app created with Client ID and Secret config file created at AppData/Roaming/Claude/ The MCP server is not loading in Claude Desktop. Need someone to fix this via remote desktop session (TeamViewer or AnyDesk).

title: MCP Integration with Supabase for Pricing Data
description: We are seeking a skilled developer to integrate the Model Context Protocol (MCP) Claude Desktop with a Supabase database. The project involves connecting directly to a database containing unit price matrices (PU). The ideal candidate should have experience with MCP and Supabase, ensuring efficient data retrieval and processing. Strong attention to detail and the ability to troubleshoot integration issues are essential. If you are passionate about database connections and have relevant experience, we would love to hear from you!

title: Claude Code Meta Ads MCP Setup/Consultation
description: What I need you to do: Get the Meta Ads MCP server connecting properly to Claude desktop on my Mac Confirm all 16 tools are accessible and functional (list accounts, campaigns, insights, create/pause campaigns, etc.) Optionally: also set up Slack and Dropbox MCP connections while you're in there

title: MCP Server Development for RAG Database Integration
description: We are seeking a skilled developer to create a Managed Control Plane (MCP) server capable of interfacing with a RAG database to fetch contextual information for our client. The ideal candidate will have experience in server development, database connectivity, and API integration. This project will involve configuring the MCP server to efficiently retrieve and manage data from the RAG database. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently are essential.

title: Python / MCP developer to connect with property management software
duration: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
description: I run a real estate investment firm and we use Rent Manager as our property management software. I'm building out an AI-powered operations layer using Claude and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The project: Build and maintain a Python-based MCP server that connects Claude to the Rent Manager API. Bonus is if you can extend it, maintain it, and help me learn as we go. What the work involves: 1. Adding new tools to an existing MCP server (Python / FastMCP) 2. Working with REST APIs, JSON, and .env-based auth 3. Light debugging and refactoring 4. Documenting what you build so it's maintainable Bonus: I'm learning Python and API development, and can pay a premium for someone who can explain their work clearly as we go. Think pair programming and occasional walkthroughs, not just shipping code and disappearing. Ideal background: - Comfortable in Python - Experience working with REST APIs - Clear communicator who can explain technical decisions in plain English - Familiarity with MCP, Claude, or Rent Manager (the property management software I use) If this sounds like you, drop a comment or DM me with: 1. A quick note on your relevant skills / background 2. One API integration you've built (doesn't need to be fancy) 3. Your project / hourly rate

title: Fix Google Ads MCP Connection for Claude AI
duration: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
description: We are seeking an experienced freelancer to resolve issues with the Google Ads MCP connection for Claude AI. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of both Google Ads and Claude AI, enabling them to efficiently troubleshoot and establish a working connection. You will collaborate closely with our team to ensure Claude AI can successfully run our Google Ads campaigns. If you have a proven track record in managing Google Ads integrations, we would love to hear from you.

title: MCP Server Developer — AI Agent Governance Platform
description: We are building an AI agent governance platform with a zero-knowledge data architecture. Sensitive payload data must never touch our servers — only cryptographic metadata and decision records are stored. The full audit record writes back to the client’s database via webhook. We need a developer with genuine production MCP server experience — specifically MCP sampling capability for intercepting agent actions before execution. Core MVP build includes: MCP integration layer, mobile-first approval interface, immutable audit log, webhook-based client-side ledger, and compliance export PDF. Looking for a developer to start immediately. Please answer these two questions in your application: How would you design a system where payload data is visible in a mobile UI but never stored on our servers? Have you worked with MCP sampling specifically?

title: AI Engineer (LLM Orchestration & MCP Server Troubleshooting)
description: Our system uses an MCP server to route tool calls from an LLM agent. Recently, tool execution has become unreliable—some requests time out, while others return incomplete responses. Issue: - The LLM generates a valid tool call - The MCP server receives the request but intermittently fails to forward it to the tool endpoint - Logs show inconsistent payload formatting and occasional schema mismatches We need you to: - Identify whether the issue is in the orchestration layer, MCP configuration, or tool interface - Fix the request/response schema mismatch - Ensure consistent tool execution and proper error handling - Provide a brief report explaining the root cause and fix

title: Senior Platform Engineer MCP / Multi-Agent AI Systems
description: We're building a production-grade AI agent orchestration platform on the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The backend is Python/FastAPI with PostgreSQL and Redis, deployed on Google Cloud Run. We coordinate multi-agent workflows where agents communicate through MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 over SSE, share persistent context, and collaborate with human operators in real time. This is a part-time, ongoing engagement (20 hrs/week) for a senior engineer who can own platform maintenance, extend the MCP server layer, and contribute to architectural decisions. You'll work directly with the founder. What you'll work on Maintain and extend FastAPI backend services and MCP server implementations Build new MCP server connectors integrating third-party APIs into the agent network Manage PostgreSQL schema, RLS policies, Redis pub/sub, and session state Design and implement multi-agent orchestration patterns with human-in-the-loop approval gates Harden containerized deployments on GCP Cloud Run; contribute to GovCloud migration readiness Implement and maintain OAuth 2.1 / zero-trust authentication patterns You have built or extended an MCP server — not just read the spec You're comfortable with agentic systems where the execution boundary isn't always deterministic You write clean, documented code — a future engineer should be able to own what you build You work well async, communicate proactively, and don't need hand-holding Must be based in the United States. No exceptions. Non-US proposals will not be reviewed.

title: Custom MCP Server Development with Claude AI Integration
description: Hi, I'm looking to hire a developer to build a custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that connects my Brikl webstores to Claude AI (by Anthropic). The goal is to allow Claude to manage and grow sales across multiple branded stores on my behalf. PLATFORM DETAILS - Store platform: Brikl (platform.brikl.com) - Number of stores: 2 (Always Best Care, Senior Helpers) - Brikl uses a GraphQL API - Email platform: Constant Contact (also has a REST API) WHAT THE MCP SERVER NEEDS TO DO The connector should allow Claude to perform the following actions across all stores: 1. Read store data — view products, orders, sales history, and customer data per store 2. Add products — browse the Brikl marketplace and publish selected products to specific stores 3. Run promotions — create and manage sales, discounts, and pricing updates 4. Email campaigns — connect to Constant Contact to pull customer lists by store and send targeted email campaigns TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS - Build an MCP server following Anthropic's Model Context Protocol specification (docs at modelcontextprotocol.io) - Authenticate securely with Brikl's GraphQL API using API keys - Authenticate with Constant Contact via OAuth 2.0 - Host the MCP server so it can be connected to Claude via a remote URL - Each store should be addressable individually so Claude can manage them separately DELIVERABLES - Fully functional hosted MCP server - Documentation on how to connect it to Claude - Basic testing to confirm all actions work correctly Please share your experience with MCP servers, GraphQL APIs, and any similar projects you've completed. Also include your estimated timeline and cost. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: AW - Lead AI Agent Architect (MCP, Tool Use, Autonomous Systems)
description: We are looking for an elite AI Engineer to architect and build production-grade autonomous agents for a strategic US technology client. This is not a "prompt engineering" role. You will be building complex systems where agents use real tools, execute code, and integrate with diverse APIs to automate business workflows. You must be deeply familiar with the bleeding edge of agentic frameworks (Anthropic Agent SDK, Vercel AI SDK, LangGraph) and modern patterns like the Model Context Protocol (MCP). You will be the technical lead, responsible for the agent's reasoning loop, tool definitions, and robust evaluation frameworks. Key Responsibilities: Architect and build autonomous agents that can reliably execute multi-step workflows. Design and implement tool definitions (Function Calling) using MCP (Model Context Protocol) patterns. Implement robust "Human-in-the-Loop" patterns and approval workflows. Design evaluation systems (Evals) to measure agent performance and prevent regressions. Collaborate with backend engineers to ensure safe code execution and state management. Required Skills & Experience: Deep expertise in building Agents: You have shipped agents that use tools, not just RAG chatbots. Framework Mastery: Strong experience with Anthropic Agent SDK, LangGraph, or Vercel AI SDK. Protocol Knowledge: Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a massive plus. Strong Python/TypeScript skills: You write clean, production-ready code. Evaluation Mindset: You know how to test non-deterministic systems.

title: AI Engineer Needed for MCP Server Setup and Cloud Customization
description: We are seeking an experienced AI engineer to assist us in setting up MCP servers and customizing our cloud environment. Your expertise will be critical in developing agentic workflows that enhance our operational efficiency. The ideal candidate should have a strong background in AI technologies and cloud services. If you have a passion for innovative solutions and a track record of successful implementations, we would love to hear from you!

title: MCP Server Development for RAG Database Integration
description: We are seeking a skilled developer to create a Managed Control Plane (MCP) server capable of interfacing with a RAG database to fetch contextual information for our client. The ideal candidate will have experience in server development, database connectivity, and API integration. This project will involve configuring the MCP server to efficiently retrieve and manage data from the RAG database. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently are essential.

title: MCP Server for Healthcare Provider Document Extraction
duration: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week
description: WHAT WE NEED: A healthcare SaaS needs an MCP server that extracts structured data from provider documents (licenses, certificates, immunizations, disclosures) into clean JSON. We are building a large-scale healthcare document processing system and already have ~50% of the codebase ready (Phase 1 completed). This is NOT a greenfield project We need someone to complete, optimize, and scale the existing system Core functionality: - Ingest PDFs/images → OCR + classify document type - Extract fields using domain-specific AI agents (education, licenses, immunizations, disclosures) - Validate data (formats, rules, cross-field checks) - Reconcile conflicts across multiple documents - Output master profile JSON for Healthcare SaaS API - Tech stack (sample): MCP SDK + LangGraph/Swarm orchestration + Claude/GPT-4 + Textract OCR + FastAPI + Postgres/S3 What the System Already Does: Document ingestion (PDFs/images) OCR + LLM-based extraction Basic batching and pipeline execution Initial vectorization + storage DELIVERABLES - - MCP server with multiple extraction tools - Multi-agent orchestration (ingestion → extract → validate → reconcile) - REST API for document upload + profile retrieval - Docker deployment + basic monitoring - Integration with our healthcare SaaS REQUIRED SKILLS: - Python/TypeScript backend (FastAPI/Express) - LLM agents (LangGraph, function calling, prompt engineering) - Document processing (OCR, PDF parsing) - Data validation + schema enforcement - Docker deployment - Nice to have: Healthcare data experience, MCP servers TO APPLY: Submit: - Similar project links (LLM agents or document extraction) - Your approach (1 paragraph: how you'd architect this) - Timeline + rate ($/hour or fixed) We provide: JSON schema, 20+ sample documents, test cases.
